title: Just Paxels
description: Adds Paxels to Minecraft, a combination of Pickaxe, Axe and Shovel.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38702f8fdb0376e7b1371dd403271996013decb7.png)

A Lightweight mod that adds Paxels (A combination of Pickaxe, Axe, and Shovel) for each material (Wooden,Stone,Iron,Diamond,Gold,Netherite) With a durability 3x that of the base tools.

Textures used for images by [Item Retextures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/item-retextures) resource pack

# All Credits to MCreator
